seasonality.note: Estimated outbound shipping seasonality. Indicative only.

retail_partners.name: REI

retail_partners.name: Dick's Sporting Goods
retail_partners.dc_hint: Smithton PA, Atlanta GA, Plainfield IN

talking_points: Inbound container volume from Gdańsk has grown alongside Huta automation — expect heavier, more consistent Northeast inbound flow.
Ski/snowboard SKUs and roof rack SKUs peak in opposite halves of the year — a contracted network needs elasticity both directions.
Seymour CT + Shelton CT cluster implies dense short-haul outbound into the NYC / Boston / Philly corridor: LTL is a natural fit for dealer replenishment.
Amazon and REI DC proximity suggests meaningful outbound to PA / WA / AZ — worth benchmarking vs. current linehaul network.
Peak-season accessorials (residential, liftgate for DTC, limited-access at small specialty retailers) deserve a separate accessorial schedule, not a flat rate.
